title: Meulti's Backrooms
description: Dive into the eerie and mysterious world of the Backrooms with our new mod and map ( currently in development 👀 ). Join the Discord to follow the progress !
body:
![<MB -> JOIN THE EXPERIENCE>](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48323e1a34aa9836705d9d59eb6859366789c75f_0.webp)

# 💻 Welcome to the Backrooms! 💻

Dive into a mysterious and terrifying world with our "Meulti's Backrooms" Mod for Minecraft 1.20.1. Designed for horror and exploration enthusiasts, this Mod transports you into an endless maze of oppressive rooms, where danger lurks around every corner.


#
### ⚠ The easiest way of getting in the backrooms is by suffocating in a block
### Discover by yourself the other ways 👀
#


![<SEPARATOR -> MAIN FEATURES>](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f00e2c5997ba012844b9e7e0e272e3c7c4122e.png)

🔹 **New terrifying entities:** Face brand-new creatures that roam the halls of the Backrooms, each with unique and terrifying behaviors.

🔹 **New blocks and environments:** Discover a wide variety of new blocks that capture the essence of the Backrooms, creating an oppressive and immersive atmosphere.

🔹 **Special features:** The mod introduces unique mechanics that enhance the supernatural and mysterious aspects of your adventure.

🔹 **New Dimension:** Discover a new way of exploring the backrooms with an unique dimension.

🔹 **Survival Aspects:** Try to survive this infernal dimension and build your base inside to discover more about it and it's mobs !

![<SEPARATOR -> SOLO / GRP >](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101b7a964b5e87aa962fd3a286fbfdd88a75304c.png)

While the mod is fully playable solo, we recommend a team of 1 to 4 players for an even more intense and collaborative experience. The more, the scarier! 😱

![<SEPARATOR -> WARNING>](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdbd4a8e1bce4b40d47ad0e45c6ed9422a95d807.png)

This mod contains unsettling elements that might make sensitive players feel uneasy or anxious, especially in a dark environment. Proceed with caution! 🌑

![<SEPARATOR -> ACTIVE DEV>](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1960915a05c7c61bd8a0a786a130f14a3aec493a.png)

**The mod is under active development, you can follow our progress, share your ideas, and join our community on Discord: [Link to Discord](https://discord.gg/Xrn4ewcwFD)**
